messages.forbidden_detail: You do not have permission to access this resource. Please contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.
messages.not_found_detail: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
messages.unauthorized_detail: Your session has expired or you have not logged in. Please log in to continue.
messages.try_again: Please try again in a moment.
messages.network_error: Network connection lost. Please check your connection.
